title: FACT – Inquiry Officer

basic_details.job_title: FACT Inquiry Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited (FACT) Recruitment 2026 for post of Inquiry Officer. Candidates with Graduation Can Apply Offline. The last date to apply offline is 01-06-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through FACT official website fact.co.in.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum age limit: 69 years as on 01/05/2026, engagement limited up to 70 years.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation from AICTE approved / UGC recognized University/Deemed University.

salary_details.pay_scale: Lump Sum per inquiry: Rs. 30,000/- to Rs. 50,000/-; Secretarial assistance: Rs. 5,000/- to Rs. 10,000/-; Transport allowance: Rs. 1000/- to Rs. 1750/-.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for FACT Inquiry Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: The Fertilisers and Chemicals Travancore Limited Inquiry Officer Recruitment 2026
